meaning: adj.可接近的,平易近人的,亲切的
examples: Despite being a big star, she's very approachable.
It may be to be perceived as more approachable, or more modern and stylish.
For another, it may be to be perceived as more approachable, or more modern and stylish.
Pope Francis appears to be what Argentinians would say is "campechano" - approachable, "matey", even.
Those achievements, as defined by common standards, felt possible and approachable and thus uninspiring at best.
